column3: ['The remote pilot communicates their dissatisfaction with the RAE’s performance to the CAA. ', "The CAA acknowledges receipt of the remote pilot's complaint and initiates a review of conduct of test or exam. ", 'The CAA completes their review of the conduct of the test or exam. ']
column4: ['Verified by reviewing communication logs or records between the remote pilot and the CAA. ', 'Verified by checking for any documentation, emails, or other forms of communication indicating that the CAA has acknowledged the complaint and initiated an investigation. ', 'Obtained a final report from the CAA detailing their findings and conclusions regarding the RAE’s conduct during the competency assessment. ']
